title: Comparative benchmark suite — value, efficiency, drift, security (S2-S6 / H9-H13)

acceptance_criteria.text: Implement the shared multi-arm benchmark harness covering S2 (recovery + efficiency), S3 (multi-agent coordination), S4 (context-provisioning token economy incl. C0-C9 and the C2+C3 hybrid), S5 (drift detection/staleness), and S6 (security enforcement + injection resistance) per research/benchmark-protocol.md. Task sets and per-task expected outcomes are pre-registered before runs (threats T5, T6, T8).

Instrumentation: token/cost reporting (per-request input/output tokens, context-vs-task split, requests-per-task, USD, cache-adjusted tokens); drift reporting (detection rate, time-to-detection, silent-staleness, reconciliation cost); security reporting (confusion matrix + injection-followed/detection rates).

Results across >=2 model families, reproducible from the published task sets, with the Pareto frontier (cost vs success) and scaling-curve figures. Disconfirming results recorded in findings.md with equal weight; feeds paper section 6.
